prompt: create a handwritten receipt from a Moroccan spice market, listing saffron, cardamom, and mint tea in Arabic script, with colorful spice powders dusting the weathered paper
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed image of an old, weathered receipt. The paper has a warm, aged parchment color and shows subtle creases. Handwritten on the receipt, in elegant Arabic script, are distinct line items for 'saffron', 'cardamom', and 'mint tea'. Vibrant, fine spice powders in shades of red, orange, and yellow are lightly dusted and scattered across the surface of the receipt, giving it the appearance of having come directly from a bustling Moroccan spice market.
objects: elegant Arabic script on the receipt
red spice powder scattered on the receipt
orange spice powder scattered on the receipt
yellow spice powder scattered on the receipt
